g.text: My name is [Your Name] from [Company Name]. This call is just to quickly help you and your family stay
financially protected in case of unexpected funeral costs. Do you have a minute?”
“It'll only take a minute, and I'll keep it simple.”
“Can I ask—have you already made any plans to cover funeral expenses for yourself or your family?”
“That's great—you're already thinking ahead. Many people I speak to just want to make sure they're not
overpaying or that their cover is enough.”
“You're not alone—most people haven't yet, and that's exactly why I'm calling. Funeral costs can be quite
“The reality is, funerals today can cost thousands, and families often struggle to pay upfront.
Our goal is to make sure your loved ones don't have to carry that burden during an already difficult time.”
“Most younger clients take this as a way to protect their parents or dependents early—while premiums are
still low. It's a smart financial move that locks in affordability.”
“Many of our clients your age take this to make sure everything is taken care of, so their family doesn't have
to worry or contribute financially when the time comes.”
“Just so I can give you the best option:
How many people would you like to cover?
Are you mainly looking to cover yourself, or your family as well?”
“Based on that, we can get you covered from as little as [Price] per month, depending on the level of cover
“I understand—many people feel that way at first. That's why we have flexible options starting very low, just to
make sure you at least have some cover in place.”
“That's fair—but just keep in mind, the sooner you start, the lower your premium stays. Would it help if I
showed you the most affordable option first?”
“That's great. Many of our clients still add a small additional policy to make sure everything is fully covered.”
“Let's get you protected today—it only takes a few minutes to set up.
I'll just confirm a few details and we can get your cover started immediately.”
“Perfect, you're now covered. Your policy details will be sent to you via [SMS/Email].
If you ever have questions, we're always here to help.”
